title: CaissifyPairingsEngineOutput
description: Output contract of caissify_pairings engines (Dutch, Casual, RoundRobin). This schema describes the value returned by `engine.generate_pairings()` and by `caissify-pairings` CLI: a JSON array of pairing rows.

PairingRow.description: One pairing in a round. A regular game has both white_id and black_id set; a bye row has black_id=null and bye=true.

white_id.description: Player id assigned white (or the sole player, if bye=true).

black_id.description: Player id assigned black. MUST be null for bye rows.

bye.description: True iff this row represents a bye. Absent or false otherwise. When present and true, black_id MUST be null.

bye_type.description: FIDE TRF16 bye code. U = engine-issued pairing-allocated bye; F = administrative full-point bye; H = half-point bye; Z = zero-point bye. Only set on bye rows.

float_type.description: Float direction for cross-score-group pairings. 'down' = higher-scoring player floated down; 'up' = lower-scoring player floated up; 'none' = no float. Absent on same-score pairings.

allOf.description: If bye=true, black_id must be null.
If black_id is null, this row must be a bye.
